hypothesis_en: Mr President, ladies and gentlemen, I ask you to take your seats, the session is now open. Mr Vossy's parliamentary delegation in the context of pending judicial proceedings before the Court of Brescia, the Court of Bergamo and the Court of First Instance of Milan. Mr Koldo Gorostiaga, former Member of the European Parliament, has sent to Parliament a request for protection of his parliamentary immunity in the context of a pending judicial procedure before the first investigating judge of the Grand Tribunal of Paris. Ladies and gentlemen, in accordance with the agreement reached by the Conference of Presidents, I propose that the agenda for today's session be amended as follows: From 9 to 11 we will continue the debate on the statement by the President-in-Office of the Commission. I hope that in two hours we will have time to listen to all the Members who wish to speak without leaving, as we did yesterday, our temporary schedule. We will resume the session at 11.30 a.m. and each speaker, speaking on behalf of each political group, will be able to speak for a maximum of three minutes each before the election of the President of the Commission. If there is no observation, the amendment to the agenda is approved, and we move on to the next item on the agenda, which is to continue the debate on the statement made yesterday by the President-in-Office of the Commission and the list of speakers. Mr Nassauer, the European People's Party, has the floor for a maximum of three minutes.

Nassauer of the EPP-ED group now has the floor for a maximum of three minutes ((President starts speaking)) Señor Nassauer está llegando ((President stops speaking)) Mr Nassauer is taking his seat
